emptyState: Complete a few habits and your progress — adherence, balance, and what to do next — shows up here.
radarProvenance: Modeled from your habits · tap an axis to dig in
heatProvenance: Each cell is a day · tap one to review it
mapProvenance: {{label}} ← its habits · tap a habit to open it
emptyGoals: No goals yet. Create one to ladder your habits up to a why.
emptyBuckets: No buckets yet. Organize habits into buckets to track them here.
emptyHabits: No scheduled habits yet. Add a recurrence or plan a habit to track adherence.
capRadarProvenance: Modeled from your habits (derived) · sensors coming soon
connectDeviceSub: Sleep, heart rate & steps will appear here as measured metrics.
